items.title: Judge temporarily halts construction of Trump's White House ballroom
items.dek: The Republican-appointed judge ruled that Trump was the "steward" of the White House, but not the "owner".
items.body: The Republican-appointed judge ruled that Trump was the "steward" of the White House, but not the "owner".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Italian Christmas meal tragedy turns into murder inquiry
items.dek: Tests results suggest the two women may have been killed with ricin, according to Italian media, but police still do not have a suspect.
items.body: Tests results suggest the two women may have been killed with ricin, according to Italian media, but police still do not have a suspect.
